nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: You are a helpful assistant specialized in image-to-video generation. create a short animation using the reference image, do not change the image composition, style or elements: a photorealistic movie of a dwarf man offering a magic rose to a elf women in a street market surrounded by people and wind in the scene.

nodes.title: Default prompt prefixes for each trained task
widgets_values:
| task_type | system prompt (prepended to T5 text) |
|---|---|
| `default` | You are a helpful assistant. |
| `t2i` | You are a helpful assistant specialized in text-to-image generation. |
| `t2v` | You are a helpful assistant specialized in text-to-video generation. |
| `i2i` | You are a helpful assistant specialized in image editing. |
| `r2i` | You are a helpful assistant specialized in subject-to-image generation. |
| `i2v` | You are a helpful assistant specialized in image-to-video generation. |
| `v2v` | You are a helpful assistant specialized in video editing. |
| `r2v` | You are a helpful assistant specialized in subject-to-video generation. |
| `vi2v` | You are a helpful assistant specialized in video editing on content propagation. |
| `rv2v` | You are a helpful assistant specialized in video editing with reference. |
| `ads2v` | You are a helpful assistant specialized in ads insertion. |
| `vrc2v` | You are a helpful assistant for editing. You may need to adjust the subject's action or position. |
| `mv2v` | You are a helpful assistant for editing. You might need to adjust the video's style, lighting, colors, textures, and the subject's pose or action. |

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values: You are a helpful assistant specialized in image-to-video generation. create a cinematic short video using the reference image: the bald man with sorcerer cloths in image 2 reference comes from the right, a women with the exactly appearance hair, face, ears, eyes and cloths showed in image 1 reference comes from the left side and both stop in front of each one, then the bald man grab an magic artefact show in image 3 reference from her bag and unlish the power of it, wind, realistic, 8k, cine film.

nodes.title: CLIP Text Encode (Positive Prompt)
widgets_values:
You are a helpful assistant specialized in subject-to-video generation.

[Background] or Scene: Use the image0 exactly scenery on the image.

[Action]: women in image2 stand in center of the image looking to the background, a man in image1 comes from the left side and goes next her and he touch her should and kiss her in a castle image0.

Rules:

- Do not change the subjects images provided, please use them as is it in the initial image subject frame.
- Scene Enviroment should be represented exaclty in image0 scenery.

widgets_values: 色调艳丽，过曝，静态，场景切换,细节模糊不清，字幕，风格，作品，画作，画面，静止，整体发灰，最差质量，低质量，JPEG压缩残留，丑陋的，残缺的，多余的手指，画得不好的手部，画得不好的脸部，畸形的，毁容的，形态畸形的肢体，手指融合，静止不动的画面，杂乱的背景，三条腿，背景人很多，倒着走, cartoon, illustration, digital paint, toon, paint, 3d, duplicated persons, twins, duplicated from same character, lose concistency, slow motion, low fps motion, No character morphing,
